SEARCH
Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.packet

Class HelloPacket

java.lang.Object
net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed
net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.packet.Packet
net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.packet.HelloPacket
All Implemented Interfaces:
JsonSerializable
public class HelloPacket extends Packet
Represents a packet that players send when they join the server.

This packet is also used for the server to reply to the player.
